changes_applied: Fixed getEventSummary() JSON truncation bug - now extracts meaningful fields from objects instead of blind JSON.stringify+slice
Merged header and status bar into single compact row with inline status indicators
Optimized recent events section with flex-1 fill, compact padding, and type color blocks with background
Redesigned ActionButton as small 28x28 icon-only buttons with tooltip attributes
Optimized notification area with tighter padding and merged title+body display
Updated EVENT_TYPE_CONFIG to include bg field for type color block backgrounds
Updated all 14 tests to match new UI structure (tooltip-based button queries)
